'''âf-p-b-j''' ('''kafapbejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaup|jaup]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaup|jaup]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-p-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| kafapbejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifapbejoko|thifapbejoko]] || [[word:jifapbejoko|jifapbejoko]] || [[word:shifapbejoko|shifapbejoko]] || [[word:kifapbejoko|kifapbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufapbejoko|thuthufapbejoko]] || [[word:jujufapbejoko|jujufapbejoko]] || [[word:shushufapbejoko|shushufapbejoko]] || [[word:kukufapbejoko|kukufapbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufapbejoko|thufapbejoko]] || [[word:jufapbejoko|jufapbejoko]] || [[word:shufapbejoko|shufapbejoko]] || [[word:kufapbejoko|kufapbejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofapbejoko|thofapbejoko]] || [[word:jofapbejoko|jofapbejoko]] || [[word:shofapbejoko|shofapbejoko]] || [[word:kofapbejoko|kofapbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚfapbejoko|thĂŚfapbejoko]] || [[word:jĂŚfapbejoko|jĂŚfapbejoko]] || [[word:shĂŚfapbejoko|shĂŚfapbejoko]] || [[word:kĂŚfapbejoko|kĂŚfapbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafapbejoko|thathafapbejoko]] || [[word:jajafapbejoko|jajafapbejoko]] || [[word:shashafapbejoko|shashafapbejoko]] || [[word:kakafapbejoko|kakafapbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafapbejoko|thafapbejoko]] || [[word:jafapbejoko|jafapbejoko]] || [[word:shafapbejoko|shafapbejoko]] || [[word:kafapbejoko|kafapbejoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafapbejithi|shafapbejithi]] || [[word:shafapbejiji|shafapbejiji]] || [[word:shafapbejishi|shafapbejishi]] || [[word:shafapbejiki|shafapbejiki]]
